roles_system_ownership.name: roles_system_ownership
roles_system_ownership.value: ("roles"."is_system_role" and "roles"."organization_id" is null and not "roles"."is_editable" and "roles"."created_by" is null) or (not "roles"."is_system_role" and "roles"."organization_id" is not null and "roles"."created_by" is not null)
